specific_question: Were all scheduled security awareness refresher sessions completed by the cybersecurity specialist for  MediConns virtual care team staff in 2024?
answer: Yes. The cybersecurity specialist completed all scheduled security awareness refresher sessions for MediConn’s virtual healthcare platform staff in 2024.
dr_question: In 2026, how can MediConn Solutions defend its virtual healthcare platform against coordinated ransomware attacks facilitated by foreign nation-state cyber threat actors, ensuring uninterrupted access to clinical systems and patient safety?
